description: Split the opencode provider into separate tiers: (1) opencode free - hardcoded models only, no modelsFetcher/passthroughModels; (2) opencode-go - updated model list matching OmniRoute; (3) opencode-zen - new full-access provider with passthroughModels and modelsFetcher in APIKEY_PROVIDERS.
steps: In src/shared/constants/providers.ts, modify the `opencode` entry in FREE_PROVIDERS: remove `passthroughModels: true` and `modelsFetcher: { url: "https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models", type: "opencode-free" }`. The entry should remain as: `opencode: { id: "opencode", alias: "oc", name: "OpenCode Free", icon: "terminal", color: "#E87040", textIcon: "OC", noAuth: true }`

In src/shared/constants/providers.ts, add `"opencode-zen"` to `APIKEY_PROVIDERS` (place it right after the `opencode-go` entry). Definition: `"opencode-zen": { id: "opencode-zen", alias: "ocz", name: "OpenCode Zen", icon: "terminal", color: "#E87040", textIcon: "OC", website: "https://opencode.ai/auth", passthroughModels: true, modelsFetcher: { url: "https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models", type: "opencode-free" }, notice: { text: "OpenCode Zen: full access to all 43+ models (Claude, GPT, Gemini, etc.) with API key.", apiKeyUrl: "https://opencode.ai/auth" } }`
In open-sse/config/providerModels.ts, keep the `oc` entry as-is (the 4 free models: deepseek-v4-flash-free, qwen3.6-plus-free, minimax-m2.5-free, nemotron-3-super-free).

In open-sse/config/providerModels.ts, update the `"opencode-go"` entry to match OmniRoute's model list: glm-5.1, glm-5, kimi-k2.6, kimi-k2.5, mimo-v2.5-pro, mimo-v2.5, mimo-v2-pro, mimo-v2-omni, minimax-m2.7 (targetFormat: claude), minimax-m2.5 (targetFormat: claude), qwen3.7-max, qwen3.6-plus (targetFormat: claude), qwen3.5-plus (targetFormat: claude), hy3-preview, deepseek-v4-pro, deepseek-v4-flash.

In open-sse/config/providerModels.ts, add a new `"opencode-zen"` entry with the full 43 model list from the API: claude-opus-4-7, claude-opus-4-6, claude-opus-4-5, claude-opus-4-1, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-5, claude-sonnet-4, claude-haiku-4-5, gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.1-pro, gemini-3-flash, gpt-5.5, gpt-5.5-pro, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-pro, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano, gpt-5.3-codex-spark, gpt-5.3-codex, gpt-5.2, gpt-5.2-codex, gpt-5.1, gpt-5.1-codex-max, gpt-5.1-codex, gpt-5.1-codex-mini, gpt-5, gpt-5-codex, gpt-5-nano, grok-build-0.1, glm-5.1, glm-5, minimax-m2.7, minimax-m2.5, kimi-k2.6, kimi-k2.5, qwen3.6-plus (targetFormat: claude), qwen3.5-plus (targetFormat: claude), big-pickle, deepseek-v4-flash-free, mimo-v2.5-free, qwen3.6-plus-free (targetFormat: claude), minimax-m2.5-free, nemotron-3-super-free. Use descriptive names for each model following the pattern used in providerModels.ts.
In open-sse/config/providerModels.ts, also add `"opencode-zen"` to the PROVIDER_ID_TO_ALIAS mapping at the bottom (in the OAUTH_ALIASES object): add `"opencode-zen": "opencode-zen"`.

Verify that after removing modelsFetcher from the opencode free provider, noAuthSync.ts will no longer fetch models for it (the filter `p.noAuth === true && p.modelsFetcher?.url` will exclude it). No code change needed in noAuthSync.ts itself.
The `opencode-free` filter in src/app/api/providers/suggested-models/route.ts can remain for backward compatibility (it will still be used by opencode-zen's modelsFetcher). No change needed.
acceptance_criteria: The `opencode` entry in FREE_PROVIDERS has no `passthroughModels` or `modelsFetcher` properties
`opencode-zen` exists in APIKEY_PROVIDERS with `passthroughModels: true` and `modelsFetcher` config

`opencode-go` model list in providerModels.ts matches OmniRoute's 16 models (glm-5.1, glm-5, kimi-k2.6, kimi-k2.5, mimo-v2.5-pro, mimo-v2.5, mimo-v2-pro, mimo-v2-omni, minimax-m2.7, minimax-m2.5, qwen3.7-max, qwen3.6-plus, qwen3.5-plus, hy3-preview, deepseek-v4-pro, deepseek-v4-flash)
`opencode-zen` model list in providerModels.ts contains all 43 models from the API
`oc` (free) model list remains unchanged with 4 free models
Running `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with no type errors
